name: creator-toolchain
description: Codex-native creator workflow system for ideation, execution, state, rules, skill creation, and audit.

interface.shortDescription: Codex-native creator workflow system for ideation, execution, state, rules, skill creation, and audit.
interface.longDescription: Creator Toolchain packages Codex skills for turning ideas into plans, executing work through Plan, Execute, Verify, Reconcile, managing repo-local state, routing domain rules, creating new skills, and auditing workflows.
defaultPrompt: Use creator-orchestrator to help me choose the right Creator Toolchain workflow.
